text.title: AI-Feature Trust Metrics for Market Research Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PM relies on monthly NPS; trust regression discovered six weeks late.
antipattern.fix: Wire signals per dimension (regen, undo, citation-hover, thumbs).

antipattern.symptom: Fairness score reported as 0.92 overall; a 30% drop hidden inside non-English users.
antipattern.root-cause: No segment cuts in fairness reporting.
antipattern.fix: Split fairness by ≥2 segments (language + plan tier).

antipattern.symptom: Post-launch thumbs-down rate of 8% looks scary; team realizes baseline was 10%.
antipattern.fix: Run baseline survey + signal capture before >5% rollout.
